pull_request.title: Version Packages
pull_request.body:
This PR was opened by the [Changesets release](https://github.com/changesets/action) GitHub action. When you're ready to do a release, you can merge this and the packages will be published to npm automatically. If you're not ready to do a release yet, that's fine, whenever you add more changesets to main, this PR will be updated.


# Releases
## @swig-wallet/api@1.3.0

### Minor Changes

-   446bb16: Add `RentDestination` action support across the TypeScript SDK so APIs, action builders, payload decoding, and MCP permission parsing can encode and accept rent-destination configs.

## @swig-wallet/coder@1.9.0

### Minor Changes

-   446bb16: Add `RentDestination` action support across the TypeScript SDK so APIs, action builders, payload decoding, and MCP permission parsing can encode and accept rent-destination configs.

### Patch Changes

-   446bb16: Fix `ProgramCurated` action encoding to include the reserved 32-byte payload so generated SignV2 instructions match on-chain expectations.

## @swig-wallet/developer@1.3.0

### Minor Changes

-   446bb16: Add `RentDestination` action support across the TypeScript SDK so APIs, action builders, payload decoding, and MCP permission parsing can encode and accept rent-destination configs.

### Patch Changes

-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
    -   @swig-wallet/api@1.3.0
    -   @swig-wallet/lib@1.9.0

## @swig-wallet/lib@1.9.0

### Minor Changes

-   446bb16: Add `RentDestination` action support across the TypeScript SDK so APIs, action builders, payload decoding, and MCP permission parsing can encode and accept rent-destination configs.

### Patch Changes

-   446bb16: Fix `ProgramCurated` action encoding to include the reserved 32-byte payload so generated SignV2 instructions match on-chain expectations.
-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
    -   @swig-wallet/coder@1.9.0

## @swig-wallet/mcp-server@1.1.0

### Minor Changes

-   446bb16: Add `RentDestination` action support across the TypeScript SDK so APIs, action builders, payload decoding, and MCP permission parsing can encode and accept rent-destination configs.

### Patch Changes

-   @swig-wallet/classic@1.9.0
-   @swig-wallet/paymaster-classic@1.0.5

## @swig-wallet/classic@1.9.0

### Patch Changes

-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
    -   @swig-wallet/coder@1.9.0
    -   @swig-wallet/lib@1.9.0

## @swig-wallet/kit@1.9.0

### Patch Changes

-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
    -   @swig-wallet/coder@1.9.0
    -   @swig-wallet/lib@1.9.0

## @swig-wallet/paymaster-classic@1.0.5

### Patch Changes

-   @swig-wallet/paymaster-core@1.0.5

## @swig-wallet/paymaster-core@1.0.5

### Patch Changes

-   Updated dependencies [446bb16]
    -   @swig-wallet/api@1.3.0

## @swig-wallet/paymaster-kit@1.0.5

### Patch Changes

-   @swig-wallet/paymaster-core@1.0.5
